identity.name: Mall Command
identity.description: A high-precision command center for mall operations. Managers have a 'God View' of the floor plan; Supervisors have a 'Scanner' for tasks. The aesthetic blends high-end retail (luxury, space, light) with military-grade logistics (precision, maps, data).
principles: Fusion: Luxury Retail x Logistics Dashboard
Zoom: Focus on the task at hand

usage.manager_dashboard: Light mode, high density. White cards on pale slate background.
usage.supervisor_app: Light mode, high contrast. Big touch targets. Clear status indicators.
usage.geofence_visuals: Use Amber-500 for the 'fence' lines and Blue-600 for the user location.

manager_portal.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Fixed Left) + Main Content Area
manager_portal.grid_system: Bento Grid (Mode B: High Density). Use grid-cols-12 for granular control.
manager_portal.spacing: Compact but breathable. p-6 for containers, gap-4 for grids.
dashboard_widgets: Live Feed (col-span-4 row-span-2) - Real-time task updates

supervisor_app.structure: Mobile PWA style. Bottom Navigation (optional) or Top Bar with Drawer.
supervisor_app.view_mode: Single Column Stack. Cards for tasks.
supervisor_app.interactions: Swipe to complete (if possible) or Large Bottom Sheet for details.
supervisor_app.constraints: Tap targets must be min 44px. No hover states.

buttons.primary: rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.mobile_action: w-full py-4 text-lg font-bold rounded-xl shadow-lg fixed bottom-6 left-0 right-0 mx-4

cards.dashboard: border border-border/60 bg-card shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200 rounded-xl
cards.mobile_task: border-l-4 border-l-primary bg-white shadow-sm rounded-r-lg mb-3 p-4 active:bg-slate-50

inputs.default: h-11 rounded-md border-input bg-background px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-background file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

maps.container: relative w-full h-full rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border
maps.style: Use a desaturated, 'light-grey' map style to make the colored geofence overlays pop.

instructions_to_main_agent.file_handling: You are working with .jsx files. Do not use TS types.
instructions_to_main_agent.auth_flow: Implement separate login redirects for Manager (/admin) vs Supervisor (/app).
instructions_to_main_agent.map_integration: Use 'react-leaflet' or a simple placeholder <div> if API keys are missing, but style it to look real.
instructions_to_main_agent.mobile_optimization: For the Supervisor view, ensure viewport meta tag prevents zooming and inputs form-control text size is 16px to prevent iOS zoom.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing: Add data-testid to all inputs and buttons.

universal_guidelines: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
All interactive elements must have data-testid.
